Synthesia

AI video generator with realistic avatars speaking your script in 120+ languages.

Category Video
Pricing $29/mo Starter
Released 2017
Affiliate 25% recurring
Visit Synthesia →

About Synthesia

Synthesia creates professional videos with AI avatars that speak your script in 120+ languages. No camera, studio, or actors needed. Upload a script, choose an avatar, and get a polished video. Great for training content, product demos, explainer videos, and social media.

Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • Realistic AI avatars
  • 120+ languages
  • No filming required
  • Professional output quality

❌ Cons

  • Avatar uncanny valley effect
  • Limited customization on cheap plans
  • Not for creative/artistic videos

Best For

Businesses creating training, explainer, or product demo videos at scale.

Tags

videoavatarsmultilingualpresentations

Descript

Edit video and audio by editing text. AI removes filler words and generates clips.
